---
title: "Adapter Specs"
subtitle: "Per-adapter operational design, runtime profile, and control mapping"
doc-type: section-landing
audience: "Integrators · adapter implementers · control assessors"
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
---

# Adapter Specs {.unnumbered}

Per-adapter technical specifications. Each adapter in the canonical
`adapter-registry.yaml` gets exactly one spec in this tree; frontmatter is
regenerated from canon on every sync. Adapter specs are paired 1:1 with
entries in [Validation Suites](../validation-suites/index.html).

## Pages in this section

Adapters currently in canon:

| Slug | Adapter | Canon anchor |
|---|---|---|
| [`cyberark`](cyberark/cyberark.html) | CyberArk PAM | `adapter-registry.yaml#cyberark` |
| [`entra-id`](entra-id/entra-id.html) | Microsoft Entra ID | `adapter-registry.yaml#entra-id` |
| [`infoblox`](infoblox/infoblox.html) | Infoblox DDI | `adapter-registry.yaml#infoblox` |
| [`intune`](intune/intune.html) | Microsoft Intune | `adapter-registry.yaml#intune` |
| [`m365`](m365/m365.html) | Microsoft 365 | `adapter-registry.yaml#m365` |
| [`mainframe`](mainframe/mainframe.html) | Mainframe integration | `adapter-registry.yaml#mainframe` |
| [`palo-alto`](palo-alto/palo-alto.html) | Palo Alto Networks | `adapter-registry.yaml#palo-alto` |
| [`patch-state`](patch-state/patch-state.html) | Patch state collector | `adapter-registry.yaml#patch-state` |
| [`pki-ca`](pki-ca/pki-ca.html) | PKI certificate authority | `adapter-registry.yaml#pki-ca` |
| [`scuba`](scuba/scuba.html) | CISA SCuBA | `adapter-registry.yaml#scuba` |
| [`scubagear`](scubagear/scubagear.html) | SCuBAGear assessment | `adapter-registry.yaml#scubagear` |
| [`service-now`](service-now/service-now.html) | ServiceNow ITSM | `adapter-registry.yaml#service-now` |
| [`siem`](siem/siem.html) | SIEM ingest | `adapter-registry.yaml#siem` |
| [`stig-compliance`](stig-compliance/stig-compliance.html) | DISA STIG compliance | `adapter-registry.yaml#stig-compliance` |
| [`terraform`](terraform/terraform.html) | Terraform state | `adapter-registry.yaml#terraform` |
| [`vuln-scan`](vuln-scan/vuln-scan.html) | Vulnerability scan ingest | `adapter-registry.yaml#vuln-scan` |

::: {.callout-note}
This list is regenerated from `src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml` by
`src/uiao/tools/sync_canon.py`. Drift between this index and the registry
is CI-blocking.
:::
